subcodes.first_line: There is only one Master—the others have names. The Master is none other than the Most Great Branch, He around Whom all names revolve.... Everything the Master says is just the same as if I said it. He is Me, and I am He.
subcodes.subjects: @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
